headline: Block (SQ) Stock Could Be 22% Undervalued After Cash App Settlement
summary: Block stock sits at an awkward valuation crossroads, with an intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model pointing to meaningful upside while traditional market multiples paint a more demanding picture and the broader checks lean expensive after a 5 year stretch of weak returns. Block shareholders have seen the stock fall about 70.0% over the past 5 years, which means many investors are still sitting on heavy losses despite the more recent rebound. On the upside, new initiatives...

headline: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
summary: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

raw.headline: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin

headline: Expeditors International of Washington and Agnico Eagle Mines have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Expeditors International earns Bull of the Day as rising earnings estimates and expanding logistics services contrast with Agnico Eagle Mines' weaker outlook.

headline: Dimassi’s Mediterranean Buffet Leverages Square as It Expands Twenty-Four Location Portfolio
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., July 23, 2026--Square today announced that Dimassi’s Mediterranean Buffet, a prominent Mediterranean buffet concept in the United States, has expanded its longstanding partnership with Square as it eyes further US expansion. Dimassi’s now operates 24 locations across Texas and California, with three additional restaurants planned for 2026, and further expansion expected. With growth on the horizon, the brand is deepening its use of Square’s platform – addin

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Block, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Keybanc  analyst Andrew Schmidt   maintains Block (NYSE:XYZ) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $100 to $105.

headline: CRM, MSFT Are Already Weathering The 'SaaSpocalypse' — Now Jack Dorsey's Block Is Buzzing In With A New AI Rival
summary: Microsoft’s Teams and Salesforce’s Slack dominate the workplace messaging market, and investors are watching whether Block can gain traction with Buzz among enterprise customers.
